message:
feat(web): Add spam prevention for support ticket submissions

Content Filter Module (src/lib/moderation/content-filter.ts):
- Implement multi-signal spam detection with configurable scoring
- URL detection: 1 link (+0.1), 2 links (+0.2), 3+ links (+0.35)
- Excessive capitalization: >60% uppercase in 40+ char content (+0.2)
- Repeated character detection: 6+ consecutive same chars (+0.2)
- Spam term detection with common patterns:
  - "free money", "work from home", "guaranteed", "click here"
  - "buy now", "limited offer", "winner", "promo code"
  - "crypto", "bitcoin", "airdrop" (+0.15 each)
- Export scanContent() returning signals, normalized text, and metrics

Spam Check Module (src/lib/moderation/spam-check.ts):
- Wrap content-filter with threshold-based decision making
- HARD_BLOCK_THRESHOLD (0.7): Reject submission outright
- REVIEW_THRESHOLD (0.4): Allow but flag for manual review
- Return structured SpamCheckResult:
  - isSpam: boolean (hard block)
  - confidence: number (0-1 score)
  - reasons: string[] (human-readable explanations)
  - requiresReview: boolean (soft flag for moderation queue)

Support Tickets API Integration:
- Import checkContentForSpam for ticket validation
- Check combined subject + message content before ticket creation
- Return 400 with specific error and reasons array if spam detected
- Set ticket status to "pending" if requiresReview, "open" otherwise
- Import addSupportTicketNote for future moderation workflow

This implementation provides immediate spam protection while maintaining
a clear audit trail. The scoring system is tunable and the threshold-based
approach allows legitimate edge cases to proceed with manual review.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
